scripts.test:localhost: npx playwright install && ENVIRONMENT=localhost NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 npx playwright test --update-snapshots --ui --grep-invert "@service:wordpress"
scripts.test:develop: npx playwright install && ENVIRONMENT=develop npx playwright test --ui --grep-invert "@wip"
scripts.test:staging: npx playwright install && ENVIRONMENT=staging npx playwright test --ui --grep-invert "@wip"
scripts.test:production: npx playwright install && ENVIRONMENT=production npx playwright test --ui --grep-invert "@wip"
